action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 8 eval failed with a shape mismatch in backbone.embeddings.position_embeddings: checkpoint has [1, 1370, 768] (518x518, patch 14) but predict.py's Dinov2Config() instantiated [1, 257, 768] (224x224). Analysis: DINOv2-base pretrained weights store 518x518 position embeddings. During training, AutoModel.from_pretrained loaded them fine. In predict.py we use pretrained=False, and the default Dinov2Config() creates a smaller embedding table. Decision: Fix model.py to explicitly set image_size=518 and patch_size=14 in Dinov2Config so the architecture is identical whether pretrained=True or False. Run a quick local debug load to verify the existing checkpoint loads, then immediately submit eval to get the DINOv2 Quickdraw baseline.
